channel.title: CrowAgent Changelog
channel.description: Public release notes from CrowAgent: product, free tools, regulatory and marketing-surface updates.

item.title: MP1: Marketing surface (tools hub, methodology pages, cookie preferences, changelog)
item.description: New /tools hub aggregating six free regulator-grade tools, six SEO landing pages, six long-form methodology pages, /cookie-preferences with three-category consent model, /changelog with RSS endpoint, top nav and footer extended with Free Tools surface, and a banned-phrase cleanup pass on the CrowCash product page.

item.title: Phase 2 launch: CrowCyber and CrowCash
item.description: CrowCyber Cyber Essentials co-pilot for UK SMEs supporting v3.3 Danzell from £99/mo; CrowCash AI credit control and accounts receivable from £79/mo; CrowESG repositioned as waitlist-only ahead of Q3 2026; multi-product bundle: any two paid products save 15%, stacks with the 10% annual saving.

item.title: Cloudflare Pages migration complete
item.description: crowagent.ai now serves from Cloudflare Pages (project crowagent-website). app.crowagent.ai and portal.crowagent.ai remain on Vercel. Eliminated cross-repo Vercel deployment risk.

item.title: CrowAgent Core v1.0 GA
item.description: EPC gap analysis with MHCLG Open Data Communities lookup; penalty exposure under SI 2015/962 reg 39 capped at £150,000; three retrofit scenarios with NPV at the 3.5% HM Treasury Green Book rate; branded PDF compliance reports.

item.title: CSRD Omnibus I in force
item.description: Directive (EU) 2026/470 in force from 18 March 2026. CSRD applicability now requires both >1,000 employees AND >€450M turnover. CSRD Checker free tool updated to reflect new thresholds.

item.title: PPN 002 effective
item.description: PPN 002 effective 24 February 2025; minimum social value weighting set at 10%. CrowMark mission mapping updated to PPN 002. PPN 06/20 retained for legacy contracts.
